description: ELM-driven cold email playbook for SaaS outreach

central.description: High elaboration route - evidence-driven, detailed messaging
subject_patterns: Your AI visibility gap vs {competitor_name} in {location}
Evidence: {competitor_name} has {gap}% higher AI visibility than {company_name}
structure_rules: Lead with specific evidence: audit numbers, competitor comparison, mechanism (KG presence)
Frame causal claim as hypothesis with clear disclaimer if simulated
Use concrete numbers: visibility scores, gap percentages, referral multipliers
Explain the mechanism: 'Knowledge graph presence' or 'AI search optimization'
Include specific next step CTA: 'I'll send the 1-page report' or 'book a 15-min review'
Keep to 200-250 words - detailed but focused

cues: Benchmark stats: 'Most businesses only appear in 15% of AI search results'
Methodological framing: 'Based on our AI visibility audit methodology'
Others in your area: 'Similar practices in {location} have seen...'
Pattern recognition: 'We've seen this pattern with {specialty} clinics'
Frame missed referrals as ongoing leakage: 'You're losing X referrals per month'
Competitive disadvantage: '{competitor_name} is capturing leads you should be getting'

rules: Use concrete numbers, not vague claims

disclaimer_templates.simulated_competitor: Note: This competitive analysis is based on a simulated preview audit. Full verification requires your participation.
disclaimer_templates.simulated_kg: We don't have your full knowledge graph entity yet—this is an estimate until verified through our audit process.
disclaimer_templates.simulated_audit: Based on a simulated preview audit of your AI visibility. Actual results may vary after full analysis.

peripheral.description: Low elaboration route - heuristic cues, low cognitive load
structure_rules: Lead with one simple question or observation
Use heuristic cues: authority + social proof + simple CTA
Avoid detailed numbers or technical explanations
Single clear CTA: '15-min walkthrough?' or 'Quick chat?'

cues: Quick benchmark: 'We help practices like yours improve AI visibility'
Seen this pattern: 'We've seen this pattern locally'
Others like you: 'Similar practices in your area'
Low-friction question: 'Have you noticed a shift in where your leads come from?'

disclaimer_templates.simulated_competitor: This is a preview estimate based on public data.
disclaimer_templates.simulated_kg: Preview estimate—full analysis available on call.
disclaimer_templates.simulated_audit: Preview estimate based on public data.

email_2.body_template:
Hi {lead_name},

I mentioned {competitor_name} in my last email. I've prepared a quick 1-page report showing how to close the visibility gap.

Would you like me to send it?

Best,
{from_name}

email_3.purpose: Commitment question - 'Should I send the steps?'
email_3.body_template:
Hi {lead_name},

Just checking in—should I send you the step-by-step guide to publishing to Wikidata knowledge graph?

It's a simple checklist that takes about 15 minutes to review.

Best,
{from_name}

email_4.body_template:
Hi {lead_name},

Last note: Similar practices in {location} have seen 2-3x more referrals after optimizing their AI visibility.

Happy to show you how in a quick 15-min call.

Best,
{from_name}
